title: Free health awareness programmes
content: Galgotias University has undertaken a proactive initiative to enhance the well-being of its community through the organization of health awareness programs. The health awareness programs at our University have proven to be instrumental in promoting a culture of well-being within the community. By providing valuable information, fostering behavioral changes, and encouraging proactive health measures, these initiatives contribute significantly not only to the overall health and vitality of the institution but also alleviate issues caused by less money to get best medical facilities.
